scientific_question: Does a known-key-aligned full 4,096-cell Reader landscape retain the hidden Direct12 position up to a key-dependent global polarity, and can both polarities replace weak members of A414 to improve an equal-eight-worker portfolio on untouched A412 holdout keys?

mechanistic_bridge.discarded_point_model: A413 learns only the feature vector at the known true cell.
mechanistic_bridge.retained_landscape_model: A415 translates every complete known-key field by XOR with its true Direct12 cell and retains the entire aligned 4,096-cell geometry.
mechanistic_bridge.exact_readout: Walsh-Hadamard XOR cross-correlation scores all 4,096 candidate translations simultaneously.
mechanistic_bridge.observed_orientation_boundary: The same A401 LOO correlation surface carries useful location information in opposite global polarities across keys.
mechanistic_bridge.polarity_consequence: Positive and negative orders are fixed as separate Readers before external fields; no target-specific polarity choice is permitted.

xor_reader_contract.field_standardization: per target and channel zero mean and unit population standard deviation across all 4,096 cells
xor_reader_contract.leave_one_out_template: arithmetic mean of the fifteen aligned training landscapes
xor_reader_contract.fullfit_template: arithmetic mean of all sixteen aligned A401 landscapes
xor_reader_contract.channel_readout: sum_j C_h,j divided by the L2 norm of template channel j
xor_reader_contract.positive_order: descending correlation, ties by lower cell index
xor_reader_contract.negative_order: ascending correlation, ties by lower cell index

training_discovery_panel.candidate_family: the 155 frozen A413 candidates plus the two fixed A415 polarity Readers
training_discovery_panel.greedy_rule: start with minimum sixteen-key geometric mean rank; repeatedly add the unused Reader minimizing pointwise-minimum geometric mean rank, ties by worst rank then canonical candidate index

external_transfer_contract.matched_baseline: the eight fixed A414 Readers at the same worker count
external_transfer_contract.primary_metric: geometric mean pointwise-minimum true-cell rank on targets 16 through 31
external_transfer_contract.qualification: A415 holdout geometric mean rank is strictly below A414 with positive additional bit gain

production_schedule_contract.ownership: minimum rank across the eight fixed A415 Readers, ties by frozen portfolio position
required_proofs: discovery depth no later than best source rank
total work at most eight times best source rank
